item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 2min ESPN just announced: 2.7 Thursday, 3.5 on Friday for a 3.1M average. With big data
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 2min ESPN just announced: 2.7 Thursday, 3.5 on Friday for a 3.1M average. With big data that’s their highest in four years. Cita Josh @LaserShow03 · 5min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter Any numbers for Thursday or Friday? 167

item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 16min Ask anyone and they'll have good things to say about Belvedere and Kingsley Club.
item.description:
Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 16min Ask anyone and they'll have good things to say about Belvedere and Kingsley Club. So this September, we're headed to Northern Michigan for two days of match play, 72 holes in total, in peak fall conditions.
This is the trip of a lifetime. 1 8 2 mil
